slides.headline: Mumbai events that are singles-friendly
slides.subhead: Go solo. Bring a friend. Meet people offline.
designNotes: Ink headline with one activity pigment accent

slides.headline: Supper Club Table for Six
slides.body: Small tables and hosted intros make this closer to a singles social than a normal restaurant plan.
slides.imageBrief: Warm desaturated editorial image for food_drink event in Lower Parel; no real venue logo unless licensed; leave calm negative space for type.

slides.headline: Photo Exhibition at Experimenter
slides.body: A gallery show is easy to attend solo and gives people a natural reason to start a conversation.
slides.imageBrief: Warm desaturated editorial image for culture event in Colaba; no real venue logo unless licensed; leave calm negative space for type.

slides.headline: Gallery Late Night
slides.body: Easy to arrive solo, art gives people something natural to talk about, and the format is low pressure.
slides.imageBrief: Warm desaturated editorial image for culture event in Colaba; no real venue logo unless licensed; leave calm negative space for type.

slides.headline: Community Run + Breakfast
slides.body: Group runs create repeated touchpoints and a natural post-run conversation window.
slides.imageBrief: Warm desaturated editorial image for active event in Marine Drive; no real venue logo unless licensed; leave calm negative space for type.

slides.headline: Beginner Pottery Social
slides.body: Beginner classes reduce social pressure because everyone is focused on the same activity.
slides.imageBrief: Warm desaturated editorial image for learning event in Khar; no real venue logo unless licensed; leave calm negative space for type.

slides.headline: Rooftop Quiz Night
slides.body: Teams, trivia, and a shared prompt make conversation easier than a cold walk-in bar plan.
slides.imageBrief: Warm desaturated editorial image for nightlife event in Bandra West; no real venue logo unless licensed; leave calm negative space for type.

slides.headline: Indie Listening Room
slides.body: Listening rooms are calmer than loud clubs and give people an easy shared reference after the set.
slides.imageBrief: Warm desaturated editorial image for music event in Andheri West; no real venue logo unless licensed; leave calm negative space for type.

slides.headline: Want the full weekly list?
slides.body: Catch is building a better way to find social events and meet people offline.
